title: Perfect Pasta Aglio e Olio
description:
Today we're making one of the greatest pasta dishes of all time: pasta aglio e olio. Just garlic, olive oil, and pasta — done right.

Ingredients:
- 400g spaghetti
- 8 cloves garlic, thinly sliced
- 1/3 cup good olive oil
- 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes
- 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste

Watch to see how a few humble ingredients become something spectacular.
